title: Intern – Data Engineer & AI/ML
company_focus:
Data engineering and AI/ML consulting on Google Cloud
Platform
description:
Job Title: Intern – Data Engineer & AI/ML (GCP)

Overview:We’re seeking curious and motivated graduates to
join us as Interns in Data Engineering & AI/ML, focused on
Google Cloud Platform (GCP). This hands-on role offers
exposure to building data pipelines and supporting AI/ML
projects under expert guidance.

Key Responsibilities: • Learn and assist in building
scalable data workflows using BigQuery, Bigtable, Spanner,
and AlloyDB. • Support data ingestion and transformation
using Dataflow, Dataproc, and Pub/Sub. • Help develop basic
ML models and contribute to PoCs. • Participate in team
discussions and documentation. • Monitor and troubleshoot
workflows with guidance. • Research and share updates on new
GCP features. Eligibility & Qualifications: • Pursuing or
recently completed a Bachelor’s in CS, IT, Math, Stats, or
related field. • Basic Python or Java skills; familiarity
with SQL. • Interest in cloud, data, or ML. • Strong
problem-solving mindset and communication skills. What We
Offer: • Mentorship from GCP professionals. • Training on
GCP, data engineering, and ML. • Hands-on project
experience. • GCP certification for selected interns. •
Certificate of completion and potential full-time offer. •
Flexible, learning-driven work environment.
responsibilities: Learn and assist in building scalable data workflows using BigQuery, Bigtable, Spanner, and AlloyDB
Support data ingestion and transformation using Dataflow, Dataproc, and Pub/Sub
Help develop basic ML models and contribute to PoCs
Participate in team discussions and documentation
Monitor and troubleshoot workflows with guidance
Research and share updates on new GCP features
use_cases: Scalable data workflow construction for enterprise analytics
Basic ML model development for proof-of-concept projects
GCP-based data infrastructure monitoring and troubleshooting
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is an intern role focused primarily on data engineering
(building data pipelines, data ingestion, transformation)
with basic ML model development and PoCs. The majority of
responsibilities involve supporting AI/ML projects through
data infrastructure rather than directly building,
deploying, or fine-tuning AI/ML models.
